prompt_sent:
The Browser skill fetches and interacts with web pages. It walks a
four-layer cascade starting from the cheapest path (HTML extraction)
and escalating only when needed (deterministic selectors, accessibility
tree, then visual set-of-marks with a vision model). The escalation
is internal; you pass `url` and `goal`, the skill chooses the layer.

Inputs: `metadata.url` (required), `metadata.goal` (required, free-text
description of what to extract or do). Output: `BrowserOutput` with
`content` (for extraction goals) or `actions` plus `final_url` (for
interaction goals), and `path` reporting the cascade layer that
actually ran. When the page is gated by CAPTCHA or login, the skill
returns `error_code="gateway_blocked"` and no content; the Planner
should route around by trying a different source URL or by handing
back to the user.

MEMORY HITS (4 from FAISS):
  - [scratchpad] Search for laptops on Flipkart with price under 80000 and extract top 3 details
      source: user_query
      raw: Open the
  Flipkart homepage at https://www.flipkart.com and use the search box to 
  search for laptops, then filter the results by price under 80000, then sort 
  the list, and give the top 3 laptops with model name, price, processor, RAM, 
  and screen size.
  - [scratchpad] Comparison of top 3 laptops under 80000 INR on Flipkart
      source: user_query
      raw: Compare
  the top 3 laptops under 80000 INR on Flipkart, give model name, price,
  processor, RAM, screen size.
  - [scratchpad] Search for laptops on Flipkart under 80000 and list top 3 results
      source: user_query
      raw: Open the
  Flipkart homepage at https://www.flipkart.com, use the search box to search
  for laptops, filter by price under 80000, sort the list, and give the top 3
  laptops with model name, price, processor, and RAM.
  - [scratchpad] Automated search and data extraction for laptops under 80000 on Flipkart
      source: user_query
      raw: Open the
  Flipkart homepage at https://www.flipkart.com, use the search box to search 
  for laptops, filter by price under 80000, sort the list, and give the top 3 
  laptops with model name, price, processor, RAM, and screen size.
